text:
The Hunter × Hunter Shueisha Jump Remix (HUNTER × HUNTER 集英社ジャンプリミックス) is a compact reprint of the manga intended as a more affordable option for readers. While printed on the same paper as the original manga, each remix volume contains roughly twenty chapters, compared to the roughly nine chapters contained in each of the original volumes; each volume ranges from 380 to nearly 600 pages while being only slightly higher in price. Thirteen volumes were published in 2016 and reprinted biweekly from spring to summer 2019, concluding with the publication of a fourteenth volume in June 2019. The fourteenth volume also contains an interview between series creator Yoshihiro Togashi and Sui Ishida, author of the one-shot prequel "Hisoka's Past". The spines of the 2016 volumes each contain a letter, spelling HUNTERXHUNTER, when standing side-by-side.
